--- Menu Page: https://www.thefamousnashvillepalace.com/food ---
Food | Nashville Palace
top of page
Food MENU
At Nashville Palace, we serve up classic Southern comfort food with a side of honky-tonk hospitality. From juicy burgers and crispy fried chicken to hearty BBQ plates, our menu is made for music lovers and good-time seekers alike. Come hungry and leave happy!
bottom of page
